message:
🐛 Fix exec WebSocket blocked by /api group JWTAuth middleware (#2250)

The exec WebSocket endpoint was registered at /api/exec, but the /api
group's JWTAuth middleware intercepted it first, returning 401. Moved
to /ws/exec (alongside the existing /ws SSE endpoint) which is not
subject to the API group's auth middleware.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
